citations.narrative:
Inside the building there were 2 unopened bags of dog food and 1 bag of shavings for bedding that was directly on the
floor. The food and bedding could come into contact with cleaning solution or water or potentially rodents and become
contaminated. When placed on the floor, it prevents the cleaning under the bags. Supplies of food and bedding must be
stored in a manner that protects the supplies from spoilage, contamination, and vermin infestation. The supplies must be
stored off the floor and away from the walls, to allow cleaning underneath and around the supplies.
Correction date: 29 January 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.1(e) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
Inside the building there were 2 unopened bags of dog food and 1 bag of shavings for bedding that was directly on the 
floor. The food and bedding could come into contact with cleaning solution or water or potentially rodents and become 
contaminated. When placed on the floor, it prevents the cleaning under the bags. Supplies of food and bedding must be 
stored in a manner that protects the supplies from spoilage, contamination, and vermin infestation. The supplies must be 
stored off the floor and away from the walls, to allow cleaning underneath and around the supplies. 
 
Correction date: 29 January 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
 n
